title: tls_certificate
description: One TLS/SSL certificate — one record per AWS ACM certificate, GCP-managed certificate, or Azure certificate. Policies check expiry, managed status, and auto-renewal.

domain.description: Primary domain name the certificate covers.

provider.description: Cloud provider or CA short name: aws, gcp, azure.

not_after.description: Absolute expiry timestamp (RFC3339). The durable, replay-safe field; days_until_expiry is derived from it.

days_until_expiry.description: Whole days until certificate expiry, derived from not_after at collection time. Negative means already expired.

is_managed.description: Certificate is managed by the cloud provider (not imported).

auto_renew.description: Certificate is configured for automatic renewal. Present only for managed certificates; omitted for imported certificates, which have no auto-renewal concept.
